textByHashes.3de75a699ad412eb51a33174b8beb9f85b813d43: Greetings, I am trying to rejuvenate the forests with a ritual. Would you like to help?
textByHashes.8faece9f3d71ff0214aec04127ed7e1cc5746b2b: Oh, well, if you change your mind, just ask.
textByHashes.16656f5f03e783ad9db4d175f1844803772e8d0d: If you could help block the odd ritual circles by standing on them, I will be able to power up the ritual.
textByHashes.51afe93aaa92cb31f00c210f466adc7e245aba01: Under one-quarter of the ritual steps have been completed.
textByHashes.0bdeec5df0d1a83538c1e077387a38eebfab7669: Over one-quarter of the ritual steps have been completed.
textByHashes.4a8b44175684bf159f8a067e18616a5d4ad9789c: Over half the ritual steps have been completed.
textByHashes.48b83d365e7633b088c85e7517ef48fb290dd86c: Over three-quarters of the ritual steps were completed. Well done!
textByHashes.4f6996d2c12de7331382b2200af676f41aa3497d: You all completed every ritual step, amazing!
